canonical_question: What are the AML/KYC requirements for financial services companies?
aliases: Know Your Customer obligations for banks
AML program requirements for financial institutions
constraints: Jurisdiction-specific thresholds vary — US uses $5,000 SAR threshold; EU member states set their own
EU AMLR not applicable until July 10, 2027; AMLA RTS on CDD due July 10, 2026
US investment adviser AML rule effective January 1, 2028
FinCEN BOI exceptive relief FIN-2026-R001 (Feb 2026) may alter beneficial ownership requirements
AML record-keeping may conflict with GDPR data minimization
FATF Travel Rule only 73% implemented globally

related_to.label: GDPR compliance — data retention conflicts with AML record-keeping
Cross-border data transfers — relevant for multi-jurisdictional AML programs

inputs_needed.question: What type of financial institution is the user operating?
options: Money services business (MSB) or payment provider
Virtual asset service provider (VASP) / crypto exchange

inputs_needed.question: In which jurisdiction(s) does the entity operate?
Does the entity have an existing AML/KYC program?
options: Mature program — needs update for new regulations

applies_to.user_segment: Financial institutions, banks, fintechs, VASPs, insurance companies, investment advisers, DNFBPs
applies_to.context: Global AML/KYC compliance — covers FATF standards, US BSA/AML, and EU AML framework
